subcodes.first_line: The reality and essence of praise and glorification befitteth and is worthy only of the Most Holy and Most Glorious Court of the Beloved One, Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقیقت و کینونت حمد و ثناء مخصوص بساط امجد اقدس حضرت محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @eulogies; reminiscences
